title: Create "Last Updated Post" Column
excerpt:
I want to be able to populate a column with the name and date of the last updated post.  I just want to log the person’s name, not assign anything to them. 
This could potentially be a refinement to the “Last Updated” co…

posts.author: RLMyrick (Rebecca Myrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to populate a column with the name and date of the last updated post. I just want to log the person’s name, not assign anything to them.
This could potentially be a refinement to the “Last Updated” column, to allow us to select which types of “updates” we want info on.
Or, it could be a whole new column template, similar to the “Last Updated” column, but only showing information on Update Posts, and not on other changes to the item’s columns.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @RLMyrick , if you have AI enabled, you can just create a long text column and choose auto fill with AI > Custom action. Try this prompt

image604×433 48.3 KB
